_comment: Official RSS feeds for the Data Department's rss_ingester (decision #75). RSS ONLY — never scrape the sites (that gets the VM IP-banned). Hand-editable: add/remove feeds freely; each feed's 'sector' is trusted as-is (the feed already knows its section), so the LLM only classifies entities/impact. A dead or moved URL is skipped per-feed, never fatal. VERIFY these URLs against each publisher's current RSS page before relying on them — publishers move feeds. name = short id, url = the feed, sector = the section label used as the record's sector.
_disabled_comment: Feeds parked here are IGNORED by load_feeds() (it reads only 'feeds'). Kept so the URL isn't lost and the reason is on record. bs_markets: hard HTTP 403 from the VM's datacenter IP — verified 2026-07-20, three consecutive attempts with a browser User-Agent, so it is an origin-side block, not a transient failure or a UA problem. It fired one 'fetch failed' problem line on the nightly ops card every single run. Re-test from the VM before restoring; do NOT work around it by scraping.
